The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant MERCURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion to Compel Deposition of Plaintiff is GRANTED. The deposition set for June 19 was properly noticed and the objection was served late. Plaintiff Melinda Barany is to appear for deposition at defense counsel's office within 5 days of notice of this order, which shall be hand served unless waived by plaintiff.
